CustomField.description: Total estimated surface disturbance in acres. Used by the CE Screener to enforce per-code acreage thresholds (e.g., EPA Sec.390(b)(1) ≤5 acres). Exceedance downgrades CE to EA.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Estimated total surface disturbance (acres). Required for CE acreage threshold checks.
CustomField.label: Disturbance Acres
